titel: Privacy protection in signal intelligence operations within the defense intelligence sector.
html: In this document, the government outlines the results of the follow-up and review of signal intelligence activities within the defense intelligence sector, conducted in 2024. This document is the annual report that the Parliament has requested in connection with the parliamentary consideration of the Act (2008:717) on signal intelligence in defense intelligence activities.
tldr: The government has conducted a review of how military signals intelligence operations function. The report details the measures taken to protect people's personal privacy.
lattlast:
The government has conducted an investigation into how military signals intelligence operates. Signals intelligence involves listening to and analyzing digital information to protect the country. This investigation was conducted in 2024.

This is part of an annual report that the parliament has mandated. The purpose of the report is to ensure that government agencies comply with the law on signals intelligence. The law is in place to ensure that the state does not monitor people inappropriately.

In the report, the government describes the results of the review. The most important aspect of the work is to ensure that the protection of people's privacy is effective when searching for threats to Sweden's security.
